Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Standard P2P process flow 1 Create Purchase Requisition 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Issue Purchase Order 4 Receive Goods 5 Vendor Invoice Received 6 Match Invoice to PO 7 Release Payment 8 Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1001 Analysis This follows the standard P2P flow perfectly No anomalies

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1002 Issue Purchase Order occurs before Approve Purchase Requisition Vendor Invoice Received occurs before goods Release Payment occurs before matching invoice before receiving goods and before approving PR Approve Purchase Requisition happens after PO Invoice and Payment Goods received after payment Match Invoice to PO happens after payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: PO issued before PR approval Bypasses authorization controls Could lead to unauthorized spending Payment released before Goods Receipt and Invoice Matching High risk of fraud or paying for goods not received or incorrect PR approved after PO and Payment Retrospective approval defeats the purpose of the control Invoice matched after payment The match is supposed to authorize the payment Doing it after is a compliance failure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1003 Release Payment occurs before Vendor Invoice Received and Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO happens after payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment released before Invoice Receipt and Goods Receipt Advance payment without invoice or goods High risk of paying for undelivered goods Bypasses three way match Match Invoice to PO happens after payment matching should precede payment to verify the obligation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1004 Receive Goods occurs before Issue Purchase Order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Goods received before PO is issued Maverick buying or retrospective PO creation The organization receives goods without a formal contract or PO in place which can lead to disputes over price terms and unauthorized purchases It breaks the procurement control environment

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Structure the response Introduction briefly stating the standard P2P process Case by case analysis Case 1001 Normal Case 1002 Multiple severe anomalies Case 1003 Premature payment Case 1004 Goods receipt before PO Summary of the business impacts fraud risk compliance maverick spend

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check timestamps Everything aligns
